title: Thelypteris cuspidata
taxonomy: Thelypteris cuspidata is classified as a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This family is a part of the larger group of ferns known as the Pteridophyta. Within the family Thelypteridaceae, Thelypteris cuspidata is placed in the subfamily Thelypteridoideae. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics, such as its leaf structure and reproductive features. Thelypteris cuspidata's classification is used to distinguish it from other species within the family and the larger group of ferns.
